content.content: Check all of my repositories and star any that have zero stars.

<function_thought>
I need to begin by retrieving the logged-in GitHub user information to gain access to the user's repositories. Once I obtain the user information, I will proceed to retrieve the list of repositories associated with the user. Afterward, I will identify any repositories that currently have zero stars and star those repositories.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_logged_in_github_user_information()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
I have successfully retrieved the logged-in user information. The user, Emma Johnson, has three repositories: 'emmajohnson/file_compression', 'emmajohnson/image_transformation', and 'emmajohnson/linear_algebra_operation'. Among these, only 'emmajohnson/file_compression' is starred. I will now check the star status of all repositories to identify those with zero stars so that I can star them.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[]</function_call>
